name: Mosquito Run 3D
description: Mosquito Run 3D is a fun running online game for boys. In the game, you will play a mosquito, and there will be many obstacles on the way. You need to increase your team numbers and suck the blood of the person in front of you, so as to get high scores. The gameplay is novel and interesting, you can sprint wildly, and there are beautiful skins waiting for you to unlock. Come to play it.
tags: 3D, Android, Animal, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Number, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle, Skill
